# remnawave_internal_squad (Resource)

Manages a Remnawave internal squad (group with inbound access control).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Squad name (2-30 chars).

### Optional

- `inbounds` (Set of String) Set of config profile inbound UUIDs.

### Read-Only

- `accessible_nodes` (List of String) List of accessible node UUIDs derived from the squad's inbound configuration (read-only).
- `uuid` (String)
